message:
fix(store,runtime): simplify WATCH ABA detection, fix touch() semantics

The per-key modification_count field was never properly incremented
on in-place mutations (touch() is called for both reads and writes).
Replaced with simpler approach: WATCH records store.dirty (global
write counter) and EXEC compares it. This is slightly more conservative
(any write to any key invalidates all watches) but is correct for ABA
detection without needing per-key write tracking.

Also: removed unused modification_count field from Entry and the
key_modification_count() method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
